1. Your task/question
2. Any formatting requirements (e.g., bullet points, code blocks, word limits)
3. Specific constraints (e.g., "avoid technical jargon," "include examples," "use only 3 paragraphs")

Once you provide these details, I'll generate a response that strictly adheres to all your requirements.
